title: Overkill Modpack
description: A collection of mods that work with JJThunder to the max datapack. Tech themed and focused.
body:
# Overkill Modpack

A modpack (not really designed) to make playing JJThunder to the max datapack more fun. The good tech mods are included here, with some extra fun mobs and what not. The main point of the pack is to enjoy the datapack and not really go too far other than that.
